headline: Is It Time To Revisit Copart (CPRT) After A 36% One Year Share Price Decline
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Copart's current share price reflects its real worth, or if the recent weakness is opening the door to value. The stock closed at US$32.32, with returns declining 4.4% over the past week, 2.9% over the past month, 14.4% year to date, and 36.4% over the last year, while the 5-year return sits at 4.0% and the 3-year return is down 27.0%. These moves sit against a backdrop of steady investor interest in Copart as a key player in vehicle remarketing and online...
